title: Watercolour Cobblemon
body:
A pack to replace the Cobblemon Textures with ones that use the colour pallets of the original Ken Sugimori watercolour art!

Currently just the Kanto Starters and Pikachu

Short term goal is to complete Kanto and Johto

Long term goal is to complete the full Pokedex

If you want to help out send me a DM on twitter @nchrane_
